article.description: — Alperen Sengun had 28 points and 11 rebounds, Kevin Durant scored 20 points, and the Houston Rockets extended their winning streak to five with a 114-104 victory over the Cleveland Cavaliers on Wednesday night.
article.headline: Alperen Sengun scores 28 points as Rockets top Cavaliers 114-104 for fifth straight win

images.caption: Aaron Holiday comes up with a steal and lays in the and-1 bucket for the Rockets vs. the Cavaliers.
images.name: Aaron Holiday gets the and-1 bucket for the Rockets

article.linkText: Alperen Sengun scores 28 points as Rockets top Cavaliers 114-104 for fifth straight win
article.story: CLEVELAND -- — Alperen Sengun had 28 points and 11 rebounds, Kevin Durant scored 20 points, and the Houston Rockets extended their winning streak to five with a 114-104 victory over the Cleveland Cavaliers on Wednesday night. Aaron Holiday scored 14 of his 18 points in the fourth quarter for Houston, which is 10-1 since starting the season with two losses. Jabari Smith Jr. scored 14 and Amen Thompson had 12 points, nine boards and five steals. De'Andre Hunter scored 25 points to pace the Cavaliers. Donovan Mitchell added 21 points, 19 in the final period when they got as close as 77-76 before the Rockets answered with back-to-back hoops by Sengun and Thompson. Evan Mobley had 18 points, but missed six of his 10 free throw attempts for Cleveland, which fell to 2-2 on a six-game homestand, its longest of the season. Jarrett Allen added eight points and seven rebounds. Houston extended its lead to 69-47 midway through the third on Smith's jumper, but the Cavaliers ended the quarter on a 23-5 run to pull within 74-70. Mobley had eight points and Lonzo Ball added seven during the surge. Durant had 13 points and Sengun had 10 points and six rebounds, powering the Rockets to a 57-40 advantage at halftime. Houston led by 14 in the opening quarter and by 20 in the second. Smith and Hunter were both called for flagrant fouls and technicals in the first half, while Cleveland's Nae'Qwan Tomlin picked up a technical. Cavaliers point guard Darius Garland (left great toe) and swingman Jaylon Tyson (concussion) both missed their fifth straight games, while shooting guard Sam Merrill (right hand sprain) was hurt Monday against Milwaukee. Tyson could return Friday. Up next Rockets: Host Denver on Friday night. Cavaliers: Host Indiana on Friday night. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/nba

images.caption: The Lakers' championship odds are on the move again after Luka Doncic's injury.
images.name: Luka Doncic [1296x729]

images.alt: Los Angeles Lakers forward LeBron James (23) scores on a breakaway dunk during the first half of an NBA basketball game against the Orlando Magic, Saturday, March 21, 2026, in Orlando, Fla.
images.caption: LeBron James and the Lakers are on a roll as March winds down.
images.name: LeBron James  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs handles the ball during the game against the Detroit Pistons on March 5, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 and Devin Vassell #24 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the New Orleans Pelicans on January 25, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.
images.name: Jaylen Brown [1296x729]

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.
images.caption: Jamal Murray has led the Nuggets while Nikola Jokic recovers from injury.

videos.description: Houston Rockets vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights
videos.headline: Houston Rockets vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Houston Rockets vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Amen Thompson drives to the paint and throws the hammer down for the Rockets vs. the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Amen Thompson elevates for Rockets jam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Amen Thompson elevates for Rockets jam) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Reed Sheppard floats it in to cap off a 10-0 Rockets run and force a Cavaliers timeout.
videos.headline: Reed Sheppard forces a Cavs timeout with nice floater

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Reed Sheppard forces a Cavs timeout with nice floater) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Evan Mobley powers to the rim and gets a smooth layup to fall for the Cavaliers vs. the Rockets.
videos.headline: Evan Mobley lays in smooth bucket for Cavs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Evan Mobley lays in smooth bucket for Cavs) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Kevin Durant drills a trey for the Rockets as tempers flare between Jabari Smith Jr. and Nae'Qwan Tomlin.
videos.headline: Tensions rise between Rockets and Cavs after KD's triple

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Tensions rise between Rockets and Cavs after KD's triple) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Jarrett Allen throws down an incredible dunk to posterize Alperen Sengun, but is called for an offensive foul.
videos.headline: Jarrett Allen's incredible dunk chalked off with offensive foul

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jarrett Allen's incredible dunk chalked off with offensive foul) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Evan Mobley backs his defender down and hits the and-1 for the Cavaliers vs. the Rockets.
videos.headline: Evan Mobley gets the and-1 to fall for Cavs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Evan Mobley gets the and-1 to fall for Cavs) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Alperen Sengun makes some space for himself and gets the hook shot to fall for the Rockets vs. the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Alperen Sengun hooks it in for Rockets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Alperen Sengun hooks it in for Rockets) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Evan Mobley drives to the paint and lays in the and-1 bucket for the Cavaliers vs. the Rockets.
videos.headline: Evan Mobley makes nice move for and-1 bucket

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Evan Mobley makes nice move for and-1 bucket) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Lonzo Ball splashes a corner 3 for the Cavaliers vs. the Rockets.
videos.headline: Lonzo cashes a corner 3 for Cavs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Lonzo cashes a corner 3 for Cavs) 2025/11/20 ESHEET
